topics.title: Income Tax Return (Box 1)
topics.summary: Aangifte inkomstenbelasting due 1 May following tax year. Box 1 2025 bands: 35.82% to €38,441; 37.48% to €76,817; 49.5% above.

topics.title: Payroll Tax (Loonheffingen)
topics.summary: Employers remit Loonheffingen monthly (income tax + national insurance premium + employee insurance contributions). 30%-ruling for qualifying expats reduced to 27% from 2027 (phased).

topics.title: BTW (VAT)
topics.summary: Standard 21%, reduced 9%, zero for certain supplies. Small-business scheme (KOR) available up to €20,000 turnover.

topics.title: Corporate Income Tax (VPB)
topics.summary: 19% on first €200,000; 25.8% above. Return due within 5 months of year-end (extension available).

topics.title: 30%-ruling phase-down
topics.summary: From 2027 the expat 30%-ruling reduces to a single 27% rate. Salary norm applies. Employers reassess applications yearly.
